architecture_pattern: Single-Function Microservice (Lightweight REST API wrapping pure logic)
summary: A minimal, stateless, high-performance email validation service exposing a simple HTTP API. The core validation logic is a pure Python function using only the standard library, designed for correctness, reliability, and sub-millisecond latency. The architecture prioritizes simplicity, observability, and horizontal scalability.

components.name: EmailValidatorCore
components.responsibility: Pure Python implementation of RFC 5322-inspired email validation: trims whitespace, checks for single '@', validates local-part and domain structure, enforces TLD presence, rejects invalid characters.

components.name: ValidationAPI
components.responsibility: Exposes REST endpoints, handles HTTP request/response lifecycle, input sanitization, error formatting, and metrics collection.

components.name: HealthMonitor
components.responsibility: Provides liveness and readiness probes for orchestration systems.

api_endpoints.description: Validates a single email address against format rules.
Health check endpoint for load balancers and orchestrators.

tech_stack.cache: None (stateless, no caching needed for validation logic)

deployment_strategy: Containerized (Docker) with Kubernetes or serverless (AWS Lambda / Cloud Run). Horizontal auto-scaling based on request rate. Immutable infrastructure. Blue-green deployments for zero-downtime updates.
security_considerations: Input is strictly validated and sanitized (whitespace trim, length cap at 254 chars), no injection vectors; TLS 1.3 enforced in production; no sensitive data stored or logged; rate limiting applied at API gateway layer; minimal attack surface (no DB, no auth, no file I/O); all dependencies pinned and scanned.
scalability_notes: Stateless design enables infinite horizontal scaling; CPU-bound but extremely lightweight (<100μs avg latency); can handle >10k RPS per instance; no shared resources or bottlenecks; scales linearly with instance count; optimized for low-latency synchronous validation.
